summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-1 is addressed in backend/main.mo with a Student type containing the required fields and a registerStudent update call. REQ-2 is addressed with a DocumentRecord type and uploadDocument call. REQ-3 is addressed in useQueries.ts with useRegisterStudent and useUploadDocument mutations wired to the actor, with React Query cache invalidation. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: useCreateStudent backward-compatible alias function that maps old full-param shape to registerStudent
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for useRegisterStudent mutation; useCreateStudent was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useUpdateStudent no-op stub for backward compatibility with ResumeBuilder
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not ask for a useUpdateStudent stub or any backward-compatibility shim for ResumeBuilder.
